_meta.note: Parameters set heuristically. Treat as null hypothesis. Experimental Researcher will test and propose replacements. Every number here is a candidate for change.

risk_free_rate.rationale: Approximation of US 10yr Treasury yield. Not dynamically updated.
risk_free_rate.hypothesis: Should be dynamically fetched and used. Impact on BS pricing unknown.

min_premium.hypothesis: Optimal threshold unknown. Too low = gambling, too high = miss OTM opportunities.

max_otm_pct.hypothesis: 40% may be too wide. Research suggests 15-25% OTM is the practical ceiling.

max_dte.hypothesis: Unknown if 183 is optimal. LEAPS research suggests 12-24 months may have structural edge.

max_sigma_move.hypothesis: Optimal threshold unknown. May be too permissive.

min_valid_iv.rationale: Yahoo IV below this is broken data

option_score_weights._note: Sum must equal 100. These weights are the PRIMARY scientific hypothesis to test.

ev_normalized_by_premium.rationale: Expected value is the core edge — should lead
ev_normalized_by_premium.hypothesis: May be too high or too low. Academic literature on Kelly/EV suggests dominance is justified.

prob_of_profit.rationale: POP capped to prevent deep-ITM bias
prob_of_profit.hypothesis: The 20 cap is arbitrary. POP vs EV relative weighting is untested.

iv_rank.rationale: Low IV rank = cheap vol = buyer's edge
iv_rank.hypothesis: Reduced from 20 to 15 to reduce double-counting with iv_vs_rv. Cut was heuristic not empirical.

iv_vs_rv.rationale: Option not overpriced vs realized vol
iv_vs_rv.hypothesis: 10pt weight arbitrary. IV/RV ratio threshold and nonlinearity unvalidated.

liquidity.hypothesis: 12pts may be appropriate for a single-user tool. Sub-weights (0.5/0.3/0.2) arbitrary.

reachability_sigma_move.hypothesis: Smallest weight. Partially redundant with max_otm_pct filter and max_sigma_move hard filter.

momentum_score_weights._note: Moving averages dominate. All weights are heuristic.

moving_averages_4ma.hypothesis: Equal weighting of 4 MAs is arbitrary. MA200 is most cited in literature for trend-following.

macd_bullish.hypothesis: Binary 0/15 — no gradation. MACD signal strength not captured.

rsi_sweet_spot_45_70.hypothesis: RSI 45-70 sweet spot is the most contested number in this model.

relative_strength_vs_spx.hypothesis: Likely important. Academic Momentum literature supports this factor strongly.

obv_trend_up.hypothesis: Volume-price divergence. Modest weight seems reasonable.

above_vwap.hypothesis: Very small weight. VWAP is an intraday concept applied to daily data.

bullish_chart_patterns.hypothesis: Pattern recognition is subjective and poorly backtested.

overextended_penalty.hypothesis: Arbitrary penalty. Definition of overextended not rigorous.

adx_bonus_penalty.hypothesis: ADX threshold of 25 for strong trend — standard but unvalidated in this context.

ichimoku_bonus_penalty.hypothesis: Ichimoku cloud position. Small weight, low confidence.

stochastic_bonus_penalty.hypothesis: Smallest indicator. Likely noise at this weight.

backtest.hypothesis: The 60/40 split is the most critical number to test. No empirical basis for this ratio.

earnings_haircut.hypothesis: 7% penalty when earnings fall before expiry. Arbitrary.
